action_items: Add unique key prop to list items in UserAvatarMenu.tsx (minor React warning)

PurchRec internal sidebar has all required items (Approval Hierarchy, Inventory Receiving, Vendor & Supplier Intel, Invoice Intelligence)

context_for_next_testing_agent: iter255 consolidated sidebar items into PurchRec module. Profile switching works via X-Dev-User-Id header. Oracle dashboard renders correctly with KPI tiles, vendor spend, open approvals, and recent invoices. BarcodeScanner.tsx was corrupted and fixed.

GET /api/auth/jwt/profiles → returns 10+ profiles including director and executive-chef
